_comment: Single source of truth for backend.py's stdout event-name protocol (M4 arch-audit). Every line backend.py prints to stdout is {"event": "<name>", ...} — see backend.py's own module docstring. lib/events.js (main.js's dispatch) and backend.py's own EVENT_NAMES frozenset both load this file, so a typo/rename on either side either fails backend.py's own emit() assertion at runtime, or is caught by tests/test_backend.py's cross-lock test (main.js's EVENTS.* usage vs this list) — never a silent drop.
